<summary>
[执行中] 尝试SEC EDGAR新搜索接口
</summary>



```python
import requests
import json

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36',
    'Accept': 'application/json',
}

# SEC的新搜索API
# US Steel CIK: 0001163302
search_url = "https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST/search-index"

params = {
    'q': 'cik:0001163302 AND formType:"10-K"',
    'dateRange': 'custom',
    'startdt': '2024-01-01',
    'enddt': '2025-12-31',
    'forms': '10-K',
    'page': 1,
    'count': 20
}

print("Searching SEC EFTS...")
r = requests.get(search_url, params=params, headers=headers, timeout=60)
print(f"Status: {r.status_code}")

if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json()
    hits = data.get('hits', {}).get('hits', [])
    print(f"Found {len(hits)} hits")
    
    for hit in hits[:5]:
        source = hit.get('_source', {})
        print(f"\nForm: {source.get('form')}")
        print(f"File name: {source.get('fileName')}")
        print(f"Description: {source.get('description')}")
        
        # 尝试获取文件路径
        if 'fileName' in source:
            filename = source['fileName']
            # 转换路径
            # 通常格式: 0001163302-25-000018.txt 或类似
            file_url = f"https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1163302/{filename}"
            print(f"File URL: {file_url}")

<summary>
SEC目录页返回200但内容未知，尝试webdriver获取动态Yahoo Finance数据</summary>



```python
# Try selenium/webdriver to get Yahoo Finance data
# This will render JavaScript and give us the actual data

import subprocess
import os

# Check if we can use playwright or selenium
print("Checking available browser automation tools...")

# Try playwright
try:
    result = subprocess.run(["playwright", "--version"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
    print(f"Playwright: {result.stdout.strip()}")
except:
    print("Playwright not available")

# Try selenium  
try:
    from selenium import webdriver
    print("Selenium available")
except:
    print("Selenium not available")

# Let's try a simpler approach - use requests with proper cookies
import requests

session = requests.Session()

# First, visit Yahoo homepage to get cookies
headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',
    'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/webp,*/*;q=0.8',
    'Accept-Language': 'en-US,en;q=0.5',
}

# Get cookies first
print("\nGetting initial cookies...")
r = session.get("https://www.yahoo.com", headers=headers, timeout=30)
print(f"Homepage status: {r.status_code}")
print(f"Cookies: {dict(session.cookies)}")

# Now try the financial data endpoint with crumb
# First get the crumb token
crumb_url = "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v1/test/getcrumb"
print(f"\nGetting crumb from: {crumb_url}")
r2 = session.get(crumb_url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
print(f"Crumb status: {r2.status_code}")
crumb = r2.text if r2.status_code == 200 else None
print(f"Crumb: {crumb}")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

  "type": "python",
  "timeout": 120,
  "cwd": "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/temp"
}
````
